description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the femtopixel/multiarchbuilder Docker image with a docker:dind service and set the DOCKER_HOST variable to tcp://docker:2375. Define a single stage called build and a job named build that runs in this stage. In the before_script, echo "$DOCKER_HUB_PASSWORD" into docker login -u "$DOCKER_HUB_LOGIN" --password-stdin and then run docker buildx create --driver=docker-container --name=buildkit-builder --use. The script step runs make. The job is restricted to the master branch using an only rule.
